title: Apply to run a supervised consumption site: How to apply - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply to run a supervised consumption site: How to apply

## Step 3. How to apply
Make sure you all the required information and documents set out in Step  2: What you need before you start .
Health Canada considers all applications on a case-by-case  basis. We are committed to processing applications without undue delay and will  keep the applicant informed during the process.
Privacy notice and legal  obligations and purpose
Download the application form

### How to submit your application
An application can be sent:
By email: hc.exemption.sc@canada.ca
Authorizations Division Office of Controlled Substances Controlled Substances Directorate Opioid Response Team Health Canada 161 Goldenrod Driveway, AL0300B Ottawa ON  K1A 0K9
